description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of slippers from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles.Product DetailsTan coloured sandals with criss- cross forefoot straps, midfoot strap and an ankle strap, fastened by a velcro closureSoft and foamy footbedOutsole stitched to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with patterned grooves and branding on the forefoot  Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
